data.name: The Modest Handmaid’s Sex Work ~I will be your partner in place of the young mistress~
data.detailed_description:
This is a Low-priced practical erotic game.

《Contents》

  • 15 separate CGs (Over 80 CGs in total!)

  • 15 H-scenes

  • Japanese voice acting for the main female characters

《Features》

  • You can have the same experience as the protagonist.

  • Three endings

  • CG Gallery Mode

  • Scene Replay Mode

《Story》

"I will not have sex before marriage. I have decided to remain pure until our wedding night."

So says Kotoha Yuuki, the daughter of a distinguished family.

And then there's me, her fiancé, Asato Fujimiya.

We're engaged, so sexual activities are a given… is what I had hoped, but considering her family's status, it makes sense that sexual relations would be on her terms.

"Of course, now that you're my fiancé, you're forbidden from seeing other women."

She gives me that warning… while at the same time making a suggestion I never could have seen coming.

"Regarding your male physiology… I am aware that if you do not empty yourselves frequently enough, it can become uncomfortable.

Therefore, please use this handmaid's body to masturbate in place of me."

Deeply confused, out of the corner of my eye, I see someone and hear the words,

"… Please excuse me."

The handmaid in question, Sayuri Kochi, then turns her back and silently begins to undress.

《Character》

Sayuri Kochi (VA: Nanami Natsukawa)

A handmaid wholeheartedly devoted to her mistress.

She comes off as quiet and modest.

She presently has no sexual experience with men, but this is a self-imposed restriction so that she does not fall for a man and become distanced from her mistress.

Kotoha Yuuki (VA: Hina Shinomiya)

The youngest child of a family with a long, distinguished heritage.

She is prohibited from so much as touching a man prior to marriage.

To demonstrate her understanding of male physiological needs, she has ordered her fiancé, Asato, to use her handmaid's body to masturbate in place of having an affair.

*Before purchasing this product, we highly recommend that you play the demo [Japanese only] to check if the game works properly on your computer in your region.

*Appetite is the licensor of this game. For inquiries about the product, please contact Tensei Games.

data.short_description: Low-priced practical erotic game! An unprecedented discussion from rich heiress Kotoha to her fiancé: to have sexual relations with the handmaid Sayuri Kochi instead…

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Pentium4 / AMD Athlon64 and higher
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Over 800 X 600 resolution Over TrueColor (32bit)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Sound card compatible with DirectSound
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2duo / AMD Phenom and higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Over 800 X 600 resolution Over TrueColor (32bit)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Sound card compatible with DirectSound
